name: Samarkand Group Plc
summary: Samarkand Group Plc operates an eCommerce platform for clients to sell their products to end consumers in China. The company's eCommerce platform comprises solutions Nomad Checkout, an eCommerce SaaS plugin to sell direct-to-consumer in China; Nomad Storefront, a solution for branded storefronts across marketplaces with stock/product/order management and live data dashboard, and analytics; Nomad Distribution, a social media platform integration solution; and Nomad Commerce,  a mobile and desktop platform for building and operating custom-built stores. It enables its own brands and other third-party consumer brands to access Chinese consumers. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
